Video Review for Gymnastics Coaches and Athletes

Review every movement instantly on your iPad, while your iPhone continues recording live. Analyze in real-time without pausing the action.

Hands-Free Coaching

Prop your iPhone up, connect to your iPad, and focus on coaching without holding devices.

Instant Review

Review each turn with frame-by-frame analysis, immediately after it happens.

No Mounted Cameras, No Expensive TVs

With your iPhone and iPad, you have all the power you need to capture practice moments without costly equipment. Keep it portable, simple, and affordable.

Portable = Powerful

Get the benefits of live video review on every event, not just the pit bar. Analyze from any angle.

Simple Setup

Set up in seconds and start capturing immediately—no complex equipment needed.

2 Hours Free, Every Week

Use an iPhone and iPad and start making the most of every practice.
